title: Spring Boot Bootstrap & Entry Point
description: ClinicBookingApplication is the main class that bootstraps the Spring application container and runs components initialization.

title: Security Configuration & Filters
description: SecurityConfig sets up security filters, authentication providers, CORS policy, and password encryption. JWT token parsing is handled in JwtAuthenticationFilter.

title: Database Entity Definitions
description: Core domain entities like Clinic, Doctor, Patient, Slot, and Appointment define the data schema using JPA annotations.

title: REST API Controller endpoints
description: Controllers process HTTP requests, validate request bodies, and delegate business workflows to services.

title: Service Implementation & Logic
description: Service classes handle transactions, booking windows validation, doctor availability checks, and slot capacity allocations.
